## Kind of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Source correction (Arabic / transliteration / translation / isnād / grading / assertion-strength)

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (zero warnings)
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Both Turkish and English copy updated, where the change is user-facing
- [ ] The CI privacy guard remains green (no new analytics / telemetry endpoints)
